item.title: Sufficient Conditions for Arising Functional Specialization
item.description: {{renderer :toc_izakv}} Question Based Structuring : What’s the importance of the question? (why do we care!) : The question : why does specialization / functional modularity arise in neural networks (artificial and biological). Or why would it / why does it not ? We can make it arise but maybe doesn’t actually do. Should we reframe the picture of spec ? Everything is still kinda correlated, but it’s not homegeneous.
